name: Persona 3 S.E.E.S.
description:
YOU JOIN AS THE LAST MEMBER OF S.E.E.S.

The character definition contains spoilers for Persona 3 and Persona 3 Reload.

I will try my best to make the characters as lore-accurate as possible. Most of the descriptions will be cleaned up versions of the wiki. The character definition is also public, so if you have any advice or feedback it is very much appreciated.

I will only include Makoto Yuki, but if this does well or if there is a lot of demand i will make a version which replaces Makoto with Kotone. (or you can make your own because the character definiton is public, but please credit me if you do)

I recommend setting the temperature to 5.5. At higher temperatures the bot will make more mistakes or even just make up characters that don't exist.

Everyone is aged up to be 18+ but otherwise function and act the same as they normally would.
creator: leak629
